text: Procedure to fix Go linker cache errors: clear the build cache, disable CGO, rebuild incrementally, then re-enable CGO
Procedure to resolve database connection pool exhaustion: check active connections, identify long-running queries, increase pool size, add connection timeout
Procedure to handle production rollback: verify rollback target version, drain active connections, apply rollback deployment, validate health checks, monitor error rates
steps: wait for health checks to pass

text: Procedure to investigate memory leaks in Go services: capture pprof heap profile, compare allocations, identify growing objects, check for goroutine leaks
Procedure to fix flaky integration tests: identify non-deterministic behavior, add proper test isolation, use deterministic mocks, add retry with backoff for external deps
steps: identify the flaky test from CI logs
check for shared state between tests
add proper test isolation or cleanup

text: Procedure to respond to TLS certificate expiry: identify affected services, deploy emergency cert, automate renewal with cert-manager, add expiry monitoring
steps: identify all services using the expired cert
add certificate expiry alerting in Prometheus

text: Procedure to handle Kafka consumer lag: check consumer group status, identify stuck partitions, reset offsets if needed, scale consumers
steps: scale consumer group if throughput insufficient

text: Procedure to run safe database migration: backup current state, apply DDL in transaction, backfill data in batches, validate row counts, swap traffic
steps: pg_dump current schema and sample data

text: Procedure to diagnose Python memory leaks: use tracemalloc to snapshot allocations, compare snapshots over time, identify growing objects, check for circular references
steps: check for circular references with gc.get_referrers
apply fix and verify memory stabilizes

text: Procedure to perform Kubernetes rolling upgrade: cordon nodes, drain workloads, upgrade kubelet, uncordon, verify pod scheduling
steps: upgrade kubelet and kubectl on node
verify all pods rescheduled and healthy

text: Workflow for setting up a new microservice: scaffold repo, configure CI, create Helm chart, deploy to staging, run smoke tests, enable monitoring
Workflow for database migration: backup schema, apply DDL migration, run data backfill, validate integrity, update connection strings, verify application health
Workflow for incident response: detect and alert, assess severity, mitigate impact, communicate status, resolve root cause, conduct post-mortem
Workflow for production release: freeze feature branch, run full test suite, build release artifacts, deploy canary, monitor metrics, promote to full rollout
Workflow for onboarding new team member: provision accounts, grant repository access, set up development environment, assign mentor, schedule architecture walkthrough
Workflow for security vulnerability remediation: triage CVE, assess impact, develop patch, test fix, deploy to production, verify resolution
Workflow for Kubernetes cluster upgrade: test upgrade in staging, cordon and drain nodes, upgrade control plane, upgrade worker nodes, validate workloads
